title: US SCHOOL SHOOTING DASHBOARD
description:
School is an educational institution designed to provide learning spaces and learning environments for the teaching of students under the direction of teachers.

    Children, teenager and adults find themselves in these places because they are filled with the desire to learn in order to impact our world. Unfortunately, we have noticed that these places of learning are sometimes turning into fields of violence that destroy lives. School Shooting has become recurring events in America. Having a deeper idea of this situation will allow us to make practical arrangements to better understand them and save lives.

    With school shooting being a major issue in our nation, let’s in this Project analyze the Percentage Fatalities and Year over Year by Month, Category, School type and states in the United States from 1990 to 2020. This will enable a better approach in making decision on how to enhance school security system in US.

Children, teenager and adults find themselves in these places because they are filled with the desire to learn in order to impact our world. Having a deeper idea of this situation will allow us to make practical arrangements to better understand them and save lives. With school shooting being a major issue in our nation, let’s in this Project analyze the Percentage Fatalities and Year over Year by Month, Category, School type and states in the United States from 1990 to 2020. This will enable a better approach in making decision on how to enhance school security system in US.

US SCHOOL SHOOTING DASHBOARD
School is an educational institution designed to provide learning spaces and learning environments for the teaching of students under the direction of teachers. Children, teenager and adults find themselves in these places because they are filled with the desire to learn in order to impact our world. Unfortunately, we have noticed that these places of learning are sometimes turning into fields of violence that destroy lives. School Shooting has become recurring events in America. Having a deeper idea of this situation will allow us to make practical arrangements to better understand them and save lives. With school shooting being a major issue in our nation, let’s in this Project analyze the Percentage Fatalities and Year over Year by Month, Category, School type and states in the United States from 1990 to 2020. This will enable a better approach in making decision on how to enhance school security system in US.
Step Name:Load Excel File in Power BI
Detailed Instructions:

Importing excel data into Power BI Desktop

US SCHOOL SHOOTING DASHBOARD
School is an educational institution designed to provide learning spaces and learning environments for the teaching of students under the direction of teachers. Children, teenager and adults find themselves in these places because they are filled with the desire to learn in order to impact our world. Unfortunately, we have noticed that these places of learning are sometimes turning into fields of violence that destroy lives. School Shooting has become recurring events in America. Having a deeper idea of this situation will allow us to make practical arrangements to better understand them and save lives. With school shooting being a major issue in our nation, let’s in this Project analyze the Percentage Fatalities and Year over Year by Month, Category, School type and states in the United States from 1990 to 2020. This will enable a better approach in making decision on how to enhance school security system in US.
Step Name:Transform Data
Detailed Instructions:

Step 1: Select column school type, right click and select replace value. Replace null by N/A in school type. Follow the same process for Category column.

Step 2: Select column school type, right click and select replace value. Replace 6/12/2020 by N/A

Step 3: Select keep rows in the home ribbon, keep range of rows and enter 1 to 1172(follow the GIF) to remove the extra rows.

Step 1: Select column school type, right click and select replace value. Replace null by N/A in school type. Follow the same process for Category column.

Step 2: Select column school type, right click and select replace value. Replace 6/12/2020 by N/A

Step 3: Select keep rows in the home ribbon, keep range of rows and enter 1 to 1172(follow the GIF) to remove the extra rows.

Insight: 

https://www.sqlshack.com/getting-started-with-query-editor-in-power-bi-desktop/#:~:text=The%20Query%20Editor%20in%20Power%20BI%20is%20used%20to%20transform,pivoting%20and%20unpivoting%20columns%2C%20etc.

Getting start with query editor in power bi desktop

Step Name:Create Calendar
Detailed Instructions:

Step 1: Go to Modeling select new table, provide name (Calendar) to the table then copy and paste the DAX (you will find a word document containing the DAX by clicking on the red icon on top). 

Step 2: Arrange to have a clear and legible DAX

US SCHOOL SHOOTING DASHBOARD
School is an educational institution designed to provide learning spaces and learning environments for the teaching of students under the direction of teachers. Children, teenager and adults find themselves in these places because they are filled with the desire to learn in order to impact our world. Unfortunately, we have noticed that these places of learning are sometimes turning into fields of violence that destroy lives. School Shooting has become recurring events in America. Having a deeper idea of this situation will allow us to make practical arrangements to better understand them and save lives. With school shooting being a major issue in our nation, let’s in this Project analyze the Percentage Fatalities and Year over Year by Month, Category, School type and states in the United States from 1990 to 2020. This will enable a better approach in making decision on how to enhance school security system in US.
Step Name:Create Conditional Column
Detailed Instructions:

Step 1: Right click on table name, select rename and rename table with “US School Shooting”

Step 2: Right click on US school shooting table. Select Copy and paste US school shooting table. Go to the new table, select School type column. Right click and select remove other columns, use the same process and select remove duplicate.

Step 3: Go to add column and select add conditional column. Give a name to the column (School Type Group) and then follow the GIF and the screenshot to create the column. Click OK

Step 4: Go to add column, select conditional column. Provide name to the column (School type Order) and Follow the GIF and Screenshot to create the column. Click OK

Step 5: Rename the table with School type then select close and apply

Step 1: Right click on table name, select rename and rename table with “US School Shooting

Step 2: Right click on US school shooting table. Select Copy and paste US school shooting table. Go to the new table, select School type column. Right click and select remove other columns, use the same process and select remove duplicate.

Step 3: Go to add column and select add conditional column. Give a name to the column (School Type Group) and then follow the GIF and the screenshot to create the column. Click OK

Step 4: Go to add column, select conditional column. Provide name to the column (School type Order) and Follow the GIF and Screenshot to create the column. Click OK

Step 5: Rename the table with School type then select close and apply

Insight: 

https://radacad.com/conditional-column-in-power-bi-using-power-query-you-can-do-anything

Conditional column in power bi  using power query

Step Name:Format Date and Create Relationship
Detailed Instructions:

Step 1: Go to data, in field select calendar table. Select Date column and go to format then select mm/dd/yyyy .Go to data, in field select US School Shooting table. Select Date column and go to format then select mm/dd/yyyy

Step 2: Go to model drag date from calendar table to date in US School Shooting table

Step 1: Go to data, in field select calendar table. Select Date column and go to format then select mm/dd/yyyy .Go to data, in field select US School Shooting table. Select Date column and go to format then select mm/dd/yyyy

 Step 2: Go to model drag date from calendar table to date in US School Shooting table

School is an educational institution designed to provide learning spaces and learning environments for the teaching of students under the direction of teachers. Children, teenager and adults find themselves in these places because they are filled with the desire to learn in order to impact our world. Unfortunately, we have noticed that these places of learning are sometimes turning into fields of violence that destroy lives. School Shooting has become recurring events in America. Having a deeper idea of this situation will allow us to make practical arrangements to better understand them and save lives. With school shooting being a major issue in our nation, let’s in this Project analyze the Percentage Fatalities and Year over Year by Month, Category, School type and states in the United States from 1990 to 2020. This will enable a better approach in making decision on how to enhance school security system in US.
Step Name:Create Logo and Title for Project
Detailed Instructions:

Step 1: Download the images need for this step by clicking on the red button at the top.

Step 2: Create the title for our dashboard.

a)    Click insert then text box, insert text (US SCHOOL SHOOTING DASHBOARD), select the font = Segoe UI, size =, 18, bold, alignment = center.

b)     size (in format, go to general X position = 0, y position = 0, width = 276, height = 97)

c)    Background Color: Custom = (70bbff)

d)    Follow the GIF for the location

Step 3: Create the Colaberry logo.

a)     Click insert then image, used image provided. In format image, go to general then implement these values. X position = 0, y position = 67, width = 105, height = 30).

c)    Follow the GIF for the location

 

Step 4: insert image.

a)     Click insert then image, used the image provided. In Format image, go to general then implement these values. X position = 276, y position = 0, width = 124, height = 97).

b)    Background Color: Custom = (70bbff)

c)    Follow the GIF for the location

Insight: 

https://www.tutorialgateway.org/add-image-to-power-bi-dashboard/

Add image in power bi dashboard

US SCHOOL SHOOTING DASHBOARD
School is an educational institution designed to provide learning spaces and learning environments for the teaching of students under the direction of teachers. Children, teenager and adults find themselves in these places because they are filled with the desire to learn in order to impact our world. Unfortunately, we have noticed that these places of learning are sometimes turning into fields of violence that destroy lives. School Shooting has become recurring events in America. Having a deeper idea of this situation will allow us to make practical arrangements to better understand them and save lives. With school shooting being a major issue in our nation, let’s in this Project analyze the Percentage Fatalities and Year over Year by Month, Category, School type and states in the United States from 1990 to 2020. This will enable a better approach in making decision on how to enhance school security system in US.
Step Name:Creating Slicer
Detailed Instructions:

Step 1: Create month slicer. Click on slicer, select date in calendar table then click on the arrow in the slicer and select dropdown. Click on the arrow close to month name in field and select Date Hierarchy, then remove day, quarter and year.

a.Format, in General X position = 400, y position = 0, width = 139, height = 97).

b.Selection Control, multi-select with CTRL ON and select all option OFF

c.Title = Month, alignment = center

 d.Click on the arrow at the top of the slicer and select dropdown

e.Background Color: Custom = (70bbff)

 

 

Step 2: Create year slicer. Click on slicer, select date in calendar table. Click on arrow and select date Hierarchy, remove day, week, quarter and month. Go to the slicer, right click on the arrow, select between.

a.Background Color: Custom = (70bbff)

b.Format, in General X position = 538, y position = 0, width = 177, height = 97).

c.Slicer, ON, Color = black

Insight: 

https://mindmajix.com/complete-guide-on-power-bi-slicers

Power bi slicer tutorial

US SCHOOL SHOOTING DASHBOARD
School is an educational institution designed to provide learning spaces and learning environments for the teaching of students under the direction of teachers. Children, teenager and adults find themselves in these places because they are filled with the desire to learn in order to impact our world. Unfortunately, we have noticed that these places of learning are sometimes turning into fields of violence that destroy lives. School Shooting has become recurring events in America. Having a deeper idea of this situation will allow us to make practical arrangements to better understand them and save lives. With school shooting being a major issue in our nation, let’s in this Project analyze the Percentage Fatalities and Year over Year by Month, Category, School type and states in the United States from 1990 to 2020. This will enable a better approach in making decision on how to enhance school security system in US.
Step Name:Creating Cards for Project
Detailed Instructions:

Step 1: create total shooting card.

a.Click on card, select total shootings in table us school shooting .

b.Format, in General X position = 716, y position = 0, width = 177, height = 97).

c.Data Label, color = black, text size = 36, font = DIN

d.Title, Total Shootings, font color = black, background color = custom(70bbff), alignment = center, text size = 14(change the text size of month slicer to 14)

e.Background, color = custom (70bbff)

f.Border, color = black ( put border with black color for month and year slicer also)

g. Category, set category OFF

Step 2: Create % fatalities card.

a.This is illustrated by using a GIF, follow along to create this card. You will copy and paste the previous slicer. Ctrl C to copy and Ctrl V to paste.

b.In format go to title and change the title to % fatalities

c.Click on %fatalities measure, in format, click on the percentage sign.

Step 3: Create YOY card.

a.This is illustrated by a GIF, follow along to create this card. You will copy and paste the previous slicer. Ctrl C to copy and Ctrl V to paste.

b.In format go to Data label, color, field value, colorArrow% YOY in US School Shooting

c.title, %YOY

d.Select  %YOY measure, in format, click on the percentage sign and put 2 decimal.

Step 4: Create Indicator

a.Click on card , select Arrow Fatality, follow the GIF to create this card.

b.Data label, color, field value, colorArrow% YOY in US School Shooting, text size = 22, font = DIN

c.Background, color = Custom (70bbff)

d.general X position = 716, y position = 0, width = 177, height = 97).

e. Follow GIF for location. Rearrange the size

Insight: 

https://www.tutorialgateway.org/create-a-card-in-power-bi/

How to create a card in power bi

US SCHOOL SHOOTING DASHBOARD
School is an educational institution designed to provide learning spaces and learning environments for the teaching of students under the direction of teachers. Children, teenager and adults find themselves in these places because they are filled with the desire to learn in order to impact our world. Unfortunately, we have noticed that these places of learning are sometimes turning into fields of violence that destroy lives. School Shooting has become recurring events in America. Having a deeper idea of this situation will allow us to make practical arrangements to better understand them and save lives. With school shooting being a major issue in our nation, let’s in this Project analyze the Percentage Fatalities and Year over Year by Month, Category, School type and states in the United States from 1990 to 2020. This will enable a better approach in making decision on how to enhance school security system in US.
Step Name:Create Map YOY by State
Detailed Instructions:

Step 1: Create shape map follow the GIF.

a.Click on shape map, select state in location and %YOY in coloration saturation. 

c.Data color, set diverging ON, minimum, color = custom (a0d1ff), value = -0.01; center, color = custom (118DFF), value = 0; maximun, color = custom (D64550), value = 0.08

d.Set default color, color = custom (a0d1ff)

e.Title, %YOY by State, font color = black, background color = custom (70bbff), alignment = center, text size = 14

f.Border thickness = 1

g.In format go to general, X position = 0, y position = 111, width = 614, height = 297). 

Step 2: Create legend. Download image provided in the word document, go to insert and select insert image.

a.General, x position = 457, y position = 294, width = 120, height = 52

b.Select text box,  text “low   High”, font = Segoe UI, text size =8, alignment = left. Follow the GIF Below

Insight: 

https://insightsoftware.com/blog/power-bi-maps/

How to create a map in power bi

US SCHOOL SHOOTING DASHBOARD
School is an educational institution designed to provide learning spaces and learning environments for the teaching of students under the direction of teachers. Children, teenager and adults find themselves in these places because they are filled with the desire to learn in order to impact our world. Unfortunately, we have noticed that these places of learning are sometimes turning into fields of violence that destroy lives. School Shooting has become recurring events in America. Having a deeper idea of this situation will allow us to make practical arrangements to better understand them and save lives. With school shooting being a major issue in our nation, let’s in this Project analyze the Percentage Fatalities and Year over Year by Month, Category, School type and states in the United States from 1990 to 2020. This will enable a better approach in making decision on how to enhance school security system in US.
Step Name:Creating Line and Clustered Column Chart % Fatalities vs YOY
Detailed Instructions:

Step 1: Click on line and clustered column chart, drag and drop monthnameshort in share axis, % fatalities in column values and %YOY in line values.

 Step 2:  To configure general, legend, x- axis and y-axis follow the Screenshots below. Y-axis color, custom = (0021ff)

Step 3: format data color and default color. Data color %YOY= Custom (12239e), default color, custom = (70bbff)

Step 4: Data Label, text size = 9, font = Segoe UI,

 customize series set ON,

-%YOY, color = custom (12239e), text size = 9,  position = under, font family = Segoe UI

-% Fatalities, color = black, text size = 9, position = outside end, font family = Segoe UI

- format shapes, shade area set ON, stroke width = 0, join point = round, line style = solid. Make sure that show background is OFF.

Step 5: Format title and order month name. Follow the GIF below

a.Title, text size = 14, alignment = center, font color = black, font family = DIN, background color = custom( 70bbff)

Step 6: Drag and drop day of week in shared axis and create drilldown then go to data and order by day of week number. Follow the GIF below.

Insight: 

https://www.tutorialspoint.com/power_bi/power_bi_visualization_options.htm#:~:text=Visualizations%20are%20used%20to%20effectively,of%20any%20Business%20Intelligence%20tool.&text=By%20default%2C%20it%20is%20the,and%20value%20axis%20under%20Visualization.

Create simple visual in power bi

Step Name:Creating Line and Clustered Column Chart % Fatalities and % YOY by School Type
Detailed Instructions:

Step 1: Create % fatalities and % YOY by School Type. This is illustrated by using a GIF, follow along to create this line and Clustered Column Chart. You will copy and paste the previous line and Clustered Column Chart. Ctrl C to copy and Ctrl V to paste. In shared axis, delete MonthNameShort and DayOfWeek, then drag and drop School type group.

Step 2: In format, go to general, x position = 0, y position = 423, width = 470 height = 297

Step 3: In format go to title and change title to “%Fatalities and %YOY by School Type”

Insight: 

https://www.tutorialspoint.com/power_bi/power_bi_visualization_options.htm#:~:text=Visualizations%20are%20used%20to%20effectively,of%20any%20Business%20Intelligence%20tool.&text=By%20default%2C%20it%20is%20the,and%20value%20axis%20under%20Visualization.

Create simple visual in power bi

US SCHOOL SHOOTING DASHBOARD
School is an educational institution designed to provide learning spaces and learning environments for the teaching of students under the direction of teachers. Children, teenager and adults find themselves in these places because they are filled with the desire to learn in order to impact our world. Unfortunately, we have noticed that these places of learning are sometimes turning into fields of violence that destroy lives. School Shooting has become recurring events in America. Having a deeper idea of this situation will allow us to make practical arrangements to better understand them and save lives. With school shooting being a major issue in our nation, let’s in this Project analyze the Percentage Fatalities and Year over Year by Month, Category, School type and states in the United States from 1990 to 2020. This will enable a better approach in making decision on how to enhance school security system in US.
Step Name:Creating Line and Clustered Column Chart %Fatalities and %YOY by Category
Detailed Instructions:

Step 1: create groups. Right click on Category column and select new group, follow the GIF Below to create the groups (I created two groups so that you can see the process). I also provided a PBIx file with the groups already created in case you don’t want to  go through all these steps. 

 

Step 3: Change the color of wallpaper, format size and location of the graphs.

Step 2: If You choose to create the groups, use these screenshots below to create the rest of the groups. They contain the group name and their components. Click OK when you done to save the groups that you have created.

Step 2: Create Line and Clustered Column Chart %Fatalities and %YOY by Category. This is illustrated by using a GIF, follow along to create this line and Clustered Column Chart. You will copy and paste the previous line and Clustered Column Chart. Ctrl C to copy and Ctrl V to paste. Remove school group type in shared axis. Drag and drop Group and Category columns in shared axis and change title to %fatalities and %YOY by Category.

Step 4: Go to general, x position = 493, y position = 423, width = 787 , height = 297

Step 5: Change the color of wallpaper, make sure that nothing is selected, go to format, wallpaper color, choose light gray.

Insight: 

https://mindmajix.com/power-bi-visualization-types

Article about power bi visualization type
